Service Oriented Blockchain Platform

Connect Wallet Start Staking Start Master Node

Build and manage quantum-safe blockchain solutions with the Cellframe SDK

Token

What is Cellframe Network?

Scalable Blockchain Platform

Cellframe Network is a scalable, open-source, next-generation platform for building and bridging blockchains and services secured by post-quantum encryption.

Blockchain for Mass Adoption

We believe that the next paradigm for blockchain technology is mass adoption, and our platform strives to expand the use cases associated with blockchain technology.

Fast and Quantum-Resistant

Cellframe can provide extremely high transaction throughput based on our original sharding implementation. In addition, post-quantum cryptography makes the system resistant to hacking by quantum computers, which are not far off.

Versatile Blockchain Solutions

We offer an environment for enterprises and developers to build a vast array of products ranging from simple low-level t-dApps to whole other blockchains on top of Cellframe Network.

How is the Cellframe Network Different?

Unique Secure Interoperability

Cellframe Network is built with a unique implementation of dual-layer sharding and conditional transactions. This allows seamless interoperability, as well as fast and economical transactions, all secured by integrated quantum safety measures.

Versatile t-dApps with C-SDK

Since our platform is built from scratch using plain C, t-dApps built on our SDK can be executed on anything from enterprise-level mainframes to your smart fridge at home, which enables developers to build a wide range of applications.

Why is Post-Quantum Encryption Important?

With the strides technology is making, quantum computers capable of breaking into the current blockchain technology will soon be on the forefront. Potentially, these computers will be a threat to every byte of data known to mankind.

Cellframe Network has integrated variable post-quantum encryption that not only supports implementation of multiple quantum-resistant signatures simultaneously, but also permits the network to upgrade algorithms on the fly. This enables the network to adapt to any future innovation happening in the field of quantum computing and renders the platform future-proof.

Our Technology

Scalable

Our technology achieves enterprise-level scalability. To scale further one just needs to add another CellChain.

Sustainable

Our network is environment-neutral as there is no mining involved, and our t-dApps can run on low-level hardware.

Decentralized

The concept of t-dApps is the next step towards true decentralization.

Economical

Unique implementation of innovation permits transactions at marginal costs.

Interoperable

Atomic swaps allow instant transactions with other chains.

Secure

Our advanced and flexible post-quantum encryption ensures next-generation safety.

Mainnet Statistics

The Cellframe ecosystem consists of many blockchain networks, the main one is called Backbone. Here you can find out the latest information on it.
